criteria.text: CLI verdict and status output resolves display names through the model: a vocab-rename fixture store shows the renamed state/verb labels, and with no model.yaml the output is byte-identical to today's, proven against existing golden expectations

the workbench board and dex render the model's display names for states, verbs, and classes (columns, chips, badges, lens labels), proven by render tests and a Playwright spec over a vocab-rename fixture store
MCP tool descriptions speak the model's class display names, proven by driving the stdio server against a vocab-rename store
